items.title: Dev's Digest: Singh on set, Bhatia's Liverpool bid, Antonio's surprise return
items.summary: Welcome to Dev's Digest, a Sky Sports column in which Asian Football Award winner Dev Trehan delivers exclusive news and reflects on some of the key developments for British South Asians in Football.

items.title: Chelsea legend John Terry QUESTIONS Morgan Rogers’ decision to choose Blues over Arsenal in record £117million transfer
items.summary: JOHN TERRY has questioned Morgan Rogers' decision to join Chelsea rather than Arsenal this summer. But the former Blues captain is "excited" to see the £117million man in action at Stamford Bridge this season. Chelsea announced Rogers' club-record transfer from Aston Villa on Monday. items.summary: Arsenal have announced the signing of winger Christos Tzolis from Club Brugge on a five-year deal.

items.summary: ARSENAL have splashed out £34million to complete the signing of Club Brugge winger Christos Tzolis. items.summary: MORE than 80,000 fans have signed an Argentine petition to replay the World Cup final due to "rigged refereeing decisions". items.title: Fury weighs in nearly two stone lighter than Wach
items.summary: Tyson Fury weighed in nearly two stone lighter than Mariusz Wach for Friday's heavyweight fight in Thailand.

items.title: Kone and Baleba strongly considered by Man Utd for third midfield signing
items.summary: Roma's Manu Kone and Brighton's Carlos Baleba are two options who are being strongly considered by Manchester United as their search for a third midfield signing continues.

items.title: Hull City owner 'disturbed' by transfer claims
